qa_pairs.question: How do users access the job monitoring interface within Open OnDemand?
qa_pairs.answer: To get an overview of all your jobs in the queue you can use the job monitoring interface. Navigate to the '''Jobs''' tab and select '''Active Jobs'''.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user view more detailed information about a specific job in the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Clicking on > to the left of a job will show you more details about the job, such as the start/end time, node list and account charged etc.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find a more detailed view of their jobs beyond the standard Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: A more detailed view of your jobs can still be found using the [https://my.scinet.utoronto.ca myscinet portal].
